sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Pickups
special_mechanics.description: Players can pick up and use nunchaku as weapons. Holding nunchuku makes player unarmed if damaged.

special_mechanics.name: 2D Platformer Combat
special_mechanics.description: Beat-em-up game with punches, kicks, and platform-based movement while fighting enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Wikipedia source provides only qualitative descriptions of gameplay and movement (noted as 'really smooth' animation), with no specific physics parameters documented. NES version details are minimal; arcade and other port information available but no numerical physics data across any version.
